metcon.name: Easter Egg Hunt
metcon.description:
Pick an egg
do the movement & prescribed reps
Find another Egg
Complete the most eggs to win a prize

hypertrophy.reasoning: Easter Egg Hunt taxes pressing and leg movements; accessory work targets posterior chain and arms for balanced development.

raw_text:
Easter Egg Hunt | Pick an egg
do the movement & prescribed reps
Find another Egg
Complete the most eggs to win a prize
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Easter Egg Hunt. Workout: Pick an egg, do the movement & prescribed reps, Find another Egg, Complete the most eggs to win a prize. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, abs.
